selection_reason: WP2.1 advanced the training PIT manifest gate. WP3.1 is the next source-only closure item and can be completed without runtime, DB, exchange, credential, order, Cost Gate, deploy, live, or bounded Demo outcome access.
objective: Emit registry_serving_contract_v1 from contract-bound training acceptance reports, PIT manifest/binding, feature/schema hashes, and exact q10/q50/q90 ONNX artifact bytes, then pass the same advisory-only contract into the existing registry trio path.
acceptance_criteria: Contract-bound quantile training emits a valid registry_serving_contract_v1 from acceptance report, PIT manifest/binding, feature/schema hashes, and q10/q50/q90 ONNX artifact bytes.
The persisted acceptance report contains canonical registry_serving_contract.
The same contract is passed to register_quantile_trio_from_onnx_out.
Missing or mismatched PIT, feature, schema, artifact, or authority data fails before DB connectivity or registry calls.
Authority flags remain advisory-only: not_authority=true, promotion_serving_ready=false, symlink_authority=false, serving_mode=advisory_only.
Non-contract-bound training preserves existing behavior and emits no synthetic registry contract.
Focused and adjacent source tests pass and no runtime/loss-control branch is consumed.
